history.ministryRejected: Returned for corrections by the Ministry of Education
history.ministryApproved: Finally approved by the Ministry of Education

AccessibilityPage.title: Accessibility Statement
AccessibilityPage.intro: Harmonia is committed to digital accessibility and to continuous improvement under WCAG 2.1 AA and Israeli Standard IS 5568.

measures.keyboard: Full keyboard navigation support across key user flows.
measures.screenReaders: Compatibility with screen readers (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver).
measures.zoom: Content remains usable at 200% zoom without losing functionality.
measures.contrast: Color contrast is implemented for readability.
measures.forms: Form fields include labels, validation messages, and error associations.
measures.alt: Images and iconography include alternative text when required.

AccessibilityPage.knownLimitations: Some modules are still under active remediation. Accessibility issues reported by users are prioritized and fixed in regular releases.
AccessibilityPage.contactDescription: If you encounter an accessibility issue, contact our accessibility coordinator.
AccessibilityPage.alternativeDescription: If you cannot access specific content, contact us and we will provide an alternative format.

RegistrationSession.warningDescription: Your registration session will expire in about {minutes} minutes. Extend to avoid losing progress.
RegistrationSession.expiredDescription: Your registration session expired for security reasons. Start a new session to continue.

Metadata.siteDescription: Smart management system for advanced conservatories.
